questions.question: How many ways can 5 people stand in a line?
How many ways can a president and VP be chosen from 8 candidates (different roles)?
How many ways to choose 3 people from a group of 7 (order doesn't matter)?
A menu has 3 appetizers, 4 entrees, and 2 desserts. How many different meals (one of each) can be ordered?
A committee of 2 men and 3 women is formed from 5 men and 6 women. How many committees are possible?
A class elects a president, secretary, and treasurer from 10 students. How many different outcomes are there?
